next_steps: Perform electrodiagnostic testing (repetitive nerve stimulation and needle electromyography)
Perform chest CT with contrast to screen for thymoma
Consider bedside edrophonium test (if safe/appropriate) or therapeutic trial of pyridostigmine
Obtain lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid protein/cytology
Consult neurology for formal evaluation of bulbar and respiratory function
Measure serum acid alpha-glucosidase activity (dried blood spot or enzyme assay)
Perform electrodiagnostic testing (Repetitive nerve stimulation and needle EMG)
Check acetylcholine receptor and MuSK antibody titers
Perform cardiac MRI with T1 mapping and late gadolinium enhancement to evaluate for infiltrative cardiomyopathy
Conduct formal swallow study and bedside speech-language pathology evaluation
Continue supportive respiratory management with non-invasive ventilation
